title: How to Learn English Efficiently
content: This blog post is summarized in this video. Please click here to view the original video.第一步：用听力搞定单词，拒绝单独死记硬背核心方法：通过主题式英语听力材料，掌握单词的发音、搭配和语境，而非机械背诵 举例： 推荐新手学习材料：EnglishPod、BBC Real Easy English、低难度英文播客； 实际学习案例：听一期关于 “Family（家庭）” 的简单播客，两位主持人用 5 分钟的提问式对话，讲解大量家庭相关必备单词，在听的过程中掌握单词的声音、搭配和使用语境。 第二步：钻研语法，先攻克 “三态一性”核心方法：摒弃语法刷题，先练动词三态（时态、情态、语态）+ 词性变化，用基础句变换形态练习 举例： （1）时态以 “读一本书” 为基础，变换不同时态造句子： 一般现在时：I read every day； 一般过去时：I read this book yesterday； 过去进行时：Yesterday when I was at the coffee house, I was reading the book when my mom called； 现在完成时：I have read this dictionary for many many times； 现在完成进行时：I’ve been reading this book。 （2）情态同样围绕 “读书”，用不同情态动词体现不同语气： I must read it again（这本书太好了，我一定要再读一遍）； I might read it again（这本书还可以，我可能再看看）。 （3）词性（一性）以单词teach为例，练习词性 / 形式变化：teach→teacher（名词）→teaching（分词 / 动名词）→taught（过去式 / 过去分词）； 同时提及名词单复数、形容词 / 副词比较级最高级、词性间转换（名变动、动变形容）均为练习重点。 第三步：猛听猛读 + 海量造句，落地句式应用核心方法：选基础材料听读，提取实用句型后，用同一个句型造不同内容的句子，实现句式活用 举例： 推荐学习材料：新概念英语（读）、英语 900 句（听）； 造句案例：提取实用句型I am really into something（我特别喜欢 / 投入某件事），进行海量拓展造句： I am really into coffee； I am really into English； I am really into AI； I am really into computer science。 第四步：培养英语思维，甩开汉语 “拐棍”核心方法：用 “三步公式” 用英文直接解释英文，不借助汉语翻译，整合三步内容形成完整英文定义 举例：以单词coffee为例，按三步公式拆解并组成定义： 明确 “是什么”：Coffee is a drink/beverage（咖啡是一种饮品）； 用形容词描述特征：black（黑色的）、brown（棕色的）、bitter（味苦的）； 说明核心特点 / 功能：keep me alert/help me to stay awake/stop me from falling asleep（让我保持清醒、不犯困）； 整合完整定义：Coffee is a black or brown drink that can help people not falling asleep。 第五步：项目式综合学习，实现能力融会贯通核心方法：定短期具体项目，通过海量听说读写输入做准备，最终产出并表达项目成果 举例： 制定项目目标：未来 7 天完成一个3 分钟的 “描述自己的城市 / 家乡” 英文演讲； 输入准备工作：听不同人介绍北京、上海、纽约、香港等城市的音频 / 视频，读家乡相关的英文文章，也可借助 AI 搜集海量听说读写相关材料； 产出成果：学习材料后完成专属演讲稿，并将稿件念出来 / 脱稿表达出来。

title: Getting started with Simulink
content: Search for “dash”it just becomes a part of the canvas.The scope just becomes a part of this canvas. And I can double click that block,and connect the signals that I would want to monitor, the plant signal, and the input signal. So this way, you don’t have to open up the Scope block. You could see the results directly in the canvas itself.,you have the option of what you want to see the results directly on the model itself. But your models are eventually going to get larger. So having the Scope block as a small way to get into it. So it really depends on your preference and the type of model that you’re working with. Pause Time Stop TimePause Time refers to the specific time in seconds at which the simulation will first pause, while Stop Time refers to the final time in seconds when the simulation will terminate. Once you start the simulation, it will first pause at the Pause Time, and you can click to continue running the simulation until it reaches the Stop Time. Cursor measurementsAnd that will bring in the cursor measurements that you want to analyze that signal, and so on. It’s useful when you are just doing signal analysis. Stepping optionsEnable stepping back and choose the stepping back here,by number any number of steps—I’m just choosing 50. Data Inspector （View Simulation History） PID tuning toola nice UI, where it visually shows me how the response should look like. And as you can see here, the dotted line is what our block is currently doing. And the solid line is how we want our block to perform. And we can adjust those the way that we want the block to perform by moving these slider values up here. So that way, it reaches steady state faster. And once we are happy with this response,we can simply click on Update Block. So that changes the parameters in the block itself. I can compare these two simulation runs.And it will visually show me how the signals are different and the difference between the values of the signal on the bottom half. How to Manage Your Simulink Model I created this from this Simulink model,it looks like it creates a shortcut for me.

title: Quick Sort Algorithm
content: Give you a length of n The integer series. Please use Quick Sort to sort this series from smallest to largest. And output the sequence in order. Enter the formatThere are two lines of input, the first of which contains an integer n。 The second line contains n integers (all integers are in.) 1∼109 range), representing the entire series. Output formatThe output is a single line that contains n integers, representing ordered sequences. Data range1≤n≤100000 Input example:3 1 2 4 5 Sample output:1 2 3 4 5 #include iostreamusing namespace std;const int N = 1e6 + 10; int n;int q[N];void QuickSort(int q[], int l, int r) if (l = r) return; int i = l - 1; int j = r + 1; int x = q[(l + r) / 2]; while (i j) do i ++; while (q[i] x); do j --; while (q[j] x); if (i j) swap(q[i], q[j]); QuickSort(q, l, j); QuickSort(q, l + 1, r);int main() scanf(%d, n); for (int i = 0; i n; i ++ ) scanf(%d,q[i]); QuickSort(q, 0, n - 1); for (int i = 0; i n; i ++ ) printf(%d ,q[i]); return 0;

title: To Visitors
content: Though miles apart, true friends feel close at heart.The English learning part of this blog is in a mix of Chinese and English; all other sections are in English only.Let this be the beginning — to keep moving forward without pause. Welcome. This is a small space for recording my learning and reflections. Algorithms, mathematics, technical practice, and occasionally some self-examination and quiet thoughts all leave their traces here. I am still learning, and still exploring. Many of my understandings may not yet be fully formed, and many expressions may fall short of completeness. Still, they are honest records of where I stand at this moment. If you happen to pass by, I hope that somewhere among these words. you might save a little time, or find a small spark of inspiration. Amid the vast sea of information, the chance to encounter one another here is already something rare. Welcome.

title: 致访客
content: 海内存知己，天涯若比邻本博客中，英语学习板块采用中英双语记录，其余内容均以英文呈现。以此为始，行而不辍 欢迎来到这里。 这是一处记录学习与思考的空间。算法、数学、技术实践，以及偶尔的自省与反思，都会在这里留下痕迹。 我仍在学习，也仍在摸索。许多理解未必成熟，许多表达也难言周全，但它们都是真实的阶段性成果。 若你偶然路过，希望其中某一段文字，能为你节省一些时间，或带来一点启发。 在浩瀚的信息之中，能够相遇，本身已是难得。 欢迎。
